codes.term: Heart failure as a complication of care (disorder)

codes.rationale: Right ventricular failure due to lung disorder is secondary heart failure caused by pulmonary disease, not primary cardiac heart failure.

summary: Recall: 88.1% (37 of 42 reference codes retrieved). Precision: 58.7%. F1: 70.5%. 3 reference codes were incorrectly excluded.

scored_codes.term: New York Heart Association Classification - Class III (finding)
scored_codes.rationale: NYHA classification is a severity assessment tool, not a diagnosis of heart failure itself; it describes functional capacity in patients with heart failure.

scored_codes.term: New York Heart Association Classification - Class II (finding)
scored_codes.rationale: NYHA classification is a severity assessment tool, not a diagnosis of heart failure itself; it describes functional capacity in patients with heart failure.

scored_codes.term: New York Heart Association Classification - Class IV (finding)
scored_codes.rationale: NYHA classification is a severity assessment tool, not a diagnosis of heart failure itself; it describes functional capacity in patients with heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure medication review (procedure)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure medication review is an administrative/procedural code for management, not a diagnosis of heart failure itself.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure resolved (finding)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure resolved indicates a past condition that is no longer present; codes for resolved conditions should be excluded.

scored_codes.term: At high risk for heart failure
scored_codes.rationale: At high risk for heart failure is a risk factor/prediction code, not a diagnosis of heart failure itself.

scored_codes.term: Assessment using congestive heart failure, hypertension, age 2, diabetes mellitus, stroke 2 - vascular disease, age, sex category score
scored_codes.rationale: This is a risk assessment score (CHA2DS2-VASc) that includes heart failure as one component, not a diagnosis of heart failure itself.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure monitoring invitation (procedure)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure monitoring invitation is an administrative/screening code, not a diagnosis of heart failure itself.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure monitoring third letter (procedure)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure monitoring third letter is an administrative/procedural code, not a diagnosis of heart failure itself.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure monitoring first letter (procedure)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure monitoring first letter is an administrative/procedural code, not a diagnosis of heart failure itself.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure monitoring second letter (procedure)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure monitoring second letter is an administrative/procedural code, not a diagnosis of heart failure itself.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure monitoring verbal invitation (procedure)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure monitoring verbal invitation is an administrative/procedural code, not a diagnosis of heart failure itself.

scored_codes.term: Congestive heart failure, hypertension, age 2, diabetes mellitus, stroke 2, vascular disease, age, sex category stroke risk score (observable entity)
scored_codes.rationale: This is a risk score observable entity (CHA2DS2-VASc), not a diagnosis of heart failure itself.

scored_codes.term: Fast track heart failure referral for transthoracic two dimensional echocardiogram (procedure)
scored_codes.rationale: This is a procedure code for referral/investigation, not a diagnosis code confirming the patient has heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Assessment using congestive heart failure, hypertension, age 75 years or older, diabetes mellitus and previous stroke or transient ischemic attack score (procedure)
scored_codes.rationale: This is a procedure code for assessment using a risk score, not a diagnosis code confirming heart failure itself.

scored_codes.term: Congestive heart failure, hypertension, age 75 years or older, diabetes mellitus and previous stroke or transient ischemic attack score (observable entity)
scored_codes.rationale: This is an observable entity representing a risk score calculation, not a diagnosis code confirming heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Education about deteriorating heart failure (procedure)
scored_codes.rationale: This is a procedure code for patient education, not a diagnosis code confirming the patient has heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure initial assessment (regime/therapy)
scored_codes.rationale: This is a regime/therapy code for initial assessment management, not a diagnosis code confirming heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure monitoring (regime/therapy)
scored_codes.rationale: This is a regime/therapy code for monitoring management, not a diagnosis code confirming heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Referral to rapid access heart failure clinic (procedure)
scored_codes.rationale: This is a procedure code for referral to a clinic, not a diagnosis code confirming the patient has heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Telehealth monitoring for chronic heart failure
scored_codes.rationale: This is a procedure code for telehealth monitoring management, not a diagnosis code confirming heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure as a complication of care (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure as a complication of care is iatrogenic heart failure, not primary heart failure from cardiac disease.

scored_codes.term: Right ventricular failure due to disorder of lung (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Right ventricular failure due to lung disorder is secondary heart failure caused by pulmonary disease, not primary cardiac heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Right ventricular failure due to disorder of pulmonary circulation (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Right ventricular failure due to pulmonary circulation disorder is secondary heart failure caused by pulmonary disease, not primary cardiac heart failure.
